CHART 443
Here, the Sun is in Taurus, is Ven.
conjunct Venus and Jupiter and Mer Mer. Jupt
cury, is in 12th (Aries). There are no Sun
planets in Gemini and Saturn is in
Cancer all alone. The native will, Dt Sat.
therefore, be born in a healthy family.
All the above five planets are on one Dh.
side of Rahu-Ketu axis. The elders of
the family went abroad and amassed
Mars
money.
